governing_law.value: Laws of the State of New York
governing_law.exact_text: This Agreement shall be governed by, and construed in accordance with, the laws of the State of New York.

fields.payment_terms: 25 basis points (0.25%) of the Accreted Value of the Remarketed Securities on the Remarketing Settlement Date
fields.notice_period: prior to 5:00 p.m. on the date immediately preceding the Commencement Date
fields.liability_cap: total fees received by the Remarketing Agent pursuant to Section 4(a)
